NE_NVGTR_SUCSFL_CNTCT_NUM 

LABEL: Number of navigator successful contacts with beneficiary 

DESCRIPTION: Navigator event (NE) summarizing the total number of navigator successful contacts with beneficiary.

COMMENT: CMS did not require bridge organizations
